arts.ttl: Eddie Nketiah told things 'can only get better' after £30million Arsenal transfer
arts.sum: The Crystal Palace striker is still waiting for his first Premier League goal for his new club - but former Eagles frontman Glenn Murray is confident he will eventually prove his worth

arts.ttl: Glasner on Esse settling; two injuries; and time away from football
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner has delivered a positive assessment of Romain Esse’s first training sessions at Crystal Palace, following the 19-year-old’s first week of training with the club.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace boss asked about transfer plans after Cheick Doucoure’s injury
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner believes that Crystal Palace have enough cover in the central midfield positions despite Cheick Doucoure’s fresh injury concern. “Against West Ham, we were lighter on numbers in midfield because of a third game in a week, but Daichi Kamada did excellently there with Will Hughes.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace closing in on the capture of 19-year-old attacking prodigy
arts.sum: Crystal Palace are closing in on the signing of Gabriel Aguayo. According to a report from Popular, the 19-year-old winger has attracted the attention of multiple clubs and the Eagles are now set to win the race for his signature. Crystal Palace are close to securing an agreement with his club Cerro Porteno. arts.ttl: Agent admits player has joined Brentford ‘with a bit of sadness’ – But Premier League ‘perfect for him’
arts.sum: Fiorentina will hold a percentage of a future sale on Michael Kayode should Brentford make his loan spell permanent in the summer. That’s according to his agent, Andrea Ritorni, who has speaking to Radio Bruno, via Fiorentina Uno, about his client’s move to Brentford this week. arts.ttl: EXCLUSIVE: Brentford eye Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen
arts.sum: FootballTransfers understands that Brentford have enquired about the availability of Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen . EXCLUSIVE: Brentford eye Barcelona defender Andreas Christensen

arts.ttl: Team News: Crystal Palace vs. Brentford injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Crystal Palace and Brentford.

arts.ttl: Report: Point apiece as Spurs hold Palace at Copers Cope
arts.sum: Crystal Palace Under-18s extended their unbeaten run to four games as they drew 1-1 with Tottenham Hotspur. Sebastian Williams opened the scoring in spectacular fashion with a brilliant long-range strike, before Ellis Lehane equalised from the spot in the second-half.

arts.ttl: Juventus attempts to tempt Tottenham, Crystal Palace and Fulham into €20m deal don’t appear to work
arts.sum: Juventus’ attempts to tempt Tottenham, Crystal Palace and Fulham into a €20m move for Nicolò Fagioli appear to have failed. That’s according to Corriere dello Sport, who report that Juventus’ attempts to drum up interest in the midfielder in England have so far failed.
